name: Morning Trap Runner — SBR Daily KPI

nodes.name: 7AM Daily Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires at 7:00 AM MST daily. Context doc confirms target: 'Replace with automated 7am SMS report via n8n -> GHL -> Zo's phone.' Replaces Zo's manual Voxer copy-paste routine.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `SELECT campaign.name, campaign.status, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.conversions, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.interactions, metrics.interaction_rate, metrics.cost_per_conversion, metrics.all_conversions_value FROM campaign WHERE segments.date BETWEEN '${new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth(), 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]}' AND '${new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0]}' AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY metrics.cost_micros DESC` }) }}

nodes.name: Google Ads — MTD Campaigns
nodes.notes: Pulls MTD campaign data via Google Ads API v18. Zo confirmed 6 active campaigns. Baseline (March 24): $3,200 spend / $43,000 sales. ROAS range: mature campaigns 30:1, newer campaigns 10:1. Conversion rates: top performers in 4%+, bottom below 1%. Query excludes current day (Zo's practice: 'I don't ever do month to date including the day cause it's not over').

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'MTD SP Campaign Report', startDate: new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth(), 1).toISOString().split('T')[0], endDate: new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0], configuration: { adProduct: 'SPONSORED_PRODUCTS', groupBy: ['campaign'], columns: ['impressions', 'clicks', 'cost', 'purchases14d', 'sales14d', 'unitsSold14d'], reportTypeId: 'spCampaigns', timeUnit: 'SUMMARY', format: 'JSON' } }) }}

nodes.name: Amazon Ads — MTD Performance
nodes.notes: Pulls Amazon Sponsored Products MTD via Reporting API v3. Zo checks ACOS (ad spend / attributed sales) vs TACOS (ad spend / total sales including organic). Baseline (March 24, 30d): $3,400 spend / $70,000 attributed sales. Significant organic lift from Google/Facebook/TikTok spillover. Account: Giant Horizons.

nodes.name: Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics
nodes.notes: START HERE — credential already configured. Pulls all MTD orders with full detail. Zo checks: gross sales, order count, checkout conversion rate (BASELINE: 27-30%, FLAGGED at 16% on March 24), return rate (elevated, monitoring), source breakdown. CRITICAL: Track referring_site to monitor the attribution anomaly. Zo's words: 'We don't even know what's going on here' re: bulk revenue from unidentified referrer. Also pulls refunds and cancellations for return rate calculation.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 2048, system: `You are the Morning Trap Runner for Sticker Burr Roller (SBR), Hildale, Utah. You produce Zo's daily KPI briefing sent at 7 AM MST via SMS.

VOICE RULES (non-negotiable):
- Contractions always. Didn't, won't, it's. Never formal.
- No em dashes. Period or comma only.
- Short sentences. One idea per sentence.
- Max one exclamation mark total.
- Plain-spoken. Knowledgeable neighbor tone. Never hype.
- BANNED: game-changer, revolutionary, unlock, leverage, seamless, incredible, amazing, powerful, supercharge

BRIEFING FORMAT (SMS-optimized, under 400 words):

[DATE] TRAP CHECK

GOOGLE ADS MTD
Spend: $X | Sales: $X | ROAS: X:1
Top campaign: [name] at [ROAS]
Bottom campaign: [name] at [ROAS]
Conversion rates: [range]

AMAZON MTD
Ad spend: $X | Attributed sales: $X
ACOS: X% | TACOS: X%
Organic signal: [strong/normal/weak]

SHOPIFY MTD
Gross sales: $X | Orders: X
Checkout conversion: X%
Return rate: X%
YoY: +/-X%

COMBINED
Total ad spend: $X | Total revenue: $X
Blended ROAS: X:1

FLAGS (if any):
[One line per issue. Be specific.]

OPPORTUNITY (if any):
[One actionable insight.]

Go win your ground war.

CRITICAL BENCHMARKS (flag deviations):
- Shopify checkout conversion: BASELINE 27-30%. Flag below 20%. ALERT below 16%.
- Google ROAS mature campaigns: BASELINE 30:1. Flag below 15:1.
- Google ROAS new campaigns: BASELINE 10:1. Flag below 5:1.
- Combined monthly ad spend: BASELINE under $7K. Flag above $10K.
- Amazon TACOS: Flag above 8%.
- Return rate: Flag if above prior month average.

ATTRIBUTION ANOMALY (always report):
Shopify shows bulk revenue from unidentified referrer source. Zo says: 'We don't even know what's going on here.' Track and report the percentage of revenue with no referrer. This affects ROAS calculations across all channels.

SOURCE BREAKDOWN (always include):
Break Shopify orders by source_name. Report: Direct, Amazon, TikTok, Google, Facebook, and 'No Referrer' as separate lines with order count and revenue.

ESCALATION ROUTING (include if flag is raised):
- Checkout conversion drop -> Christopher + Kevin
- ROAS collapse -> Kevin + Zo
- Ad spend spike -> Christopher (budget approval)
- Return rate spike -> Sammie (fulfillment)
- Attribution anomaly worsening -> Matt (system architecture)

2026 TARGETS FOR CONTEXT:
Revenue target: $4,500,000. Net margin target: 13.4%.
Ad spend ceiling: keep well below 2025's 29.1% of revenue ($908K was unsustainable).

Never fail silently. If data is missing or an API returned an error, say exactly what's missing and who needs to fix it. Route access blockers to Matt.`, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `MORNING TRAP CHECK DATA — ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}

=== GOOGLE ADS MTD ===
${JSON.stringify($('Google Ads — MTD Campaigns').item.json, null, 2)}

=== AMAZON ADS MTD ===
${JSON.stringify($('Amazon Ads — MTD Performance').item.json, null, 2)}

=== SHOPIFY MTD ===
Total orders: ${$('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().length}
Gross sales: $${$('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().reduce((sum, o) => sum + parseFloat(o.json.total_price || '0'), 0).toFixed(2)}
Refunded orders: ${$('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().filter(o => o.json.financial_status === 'refunded' || o.json.financial_status === 'partially_refunded').length}
Cancelled orders: ${$('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().filter(o => o.json.cancelled_at).length}

Source breakdown:
${JSON.stringify($('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().reduce((acc, o) => { const src = o.json.source_name || 'no_referrer'; acc[src] = acc[src] || { orders: 0, revenue: 0 }; acc[src].orders++; acc[src].revenue += parseFloat(o.json.total_price || '0'); return acc; }, {}), null, 2)}

Referring sites (top 20):
${JSON.stringify($('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().reduce((acc, o) => { const ref = o.json.referring_site || 'none'; acc[ref] = (acc[ref] || 0) + 1; return acc; }, {}), null, 2)}

Recent orders (last 10):
${JSON.stringify($('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().slice(-10).map(o => ({ name: o.json.name, total: o.json.total_price, source: o.json.source_name, referrer: o.json.referring_site, status: o.json.financial_status })), null, 2)}` }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude — Morning Briefing
nodes.notes: Claude produces Zo's morning SMS briefing. Full SBR brand voice encoded. Knows all benchmarks from March 24 baseline. Tracks the attribution anomaly. Reports source breakdown every time. Includes escalation routing (Christopher for budget, Kevin for ROAS, Sammie for returns, Matt for system issues). Never fails silently per Zo's requirement.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'SMS', contactId: $vars.ZO_GHL_CONTACT_ID, message: $('Claude — Morning Briefing').item.json.content[0].text }) }}

nodes.name: GHL SMS — Send to Zo
nodes.notes: Sends morning briefing to Zo via GHL SMS. Replaces manual Voxer routine. GHL Conversations API v2. To find ZO_GHL_CONTACT_ID: search GHL contacts for Zo by name or phone. GHL Location API key needs conversations.message.write scope. Company phone: (435) 383-4377.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ run_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], google_ads_raw: $('Google Ads — MTD Campaigns').item.json, amazon_ads_raw: $('Amazon Ads — MTD Performance').item.json, shopify_order_count: $('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().length, shopify_gross_sales: $('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().reduce((sum, o) => sum + parseFloat(o.json.total_price || '0'), 0), shopify_source_breakdown: $('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().reduce((acc, o) => { const src = o.json.source_name || 'no_referrer'; acc[src] = acc[src] || { orders: 0, revenue: 0 }; acc[src].orders++; acc[src].revenue += parseFloat(o.json.total_price || '0'); return acc; }, {}), shopify_refund_count: $('Shopify — MTD Orders + Analytics').all().filter(o => o.json.financial_status === 'refunded' || o.json.financial_status === 'partially_refunded').length, claude_briefing: $('Claude — Morning Briefing').item.json.content[0].text, sms_sent: true, sms_sent_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Supabase — Log Run
nodes.notes: Logs the full trap run to Supabase. Now includes source breakdown and refund count for tracking the attribution anomaly and return rate over time. Table: morning_trap_runs.
